data.body: 4 leaves committed (stack HEAD 94d6f3ce6): ac0e, e1f2, 74d9, 24ec. 24ec's held-out edge oracle CAUGHT A REAL BUG: the completion FAIL sidecar emit call-site in transition_close.py was unguarded, so if emit itself raised it would mask the FAIL (violating fail-closed) — added a call-site try/except guard; full gate suite green (29). This is held-out TDD doing its job. Subagent also correctly added COMPLETION_VERDICT to the write-path EVENT_TYPES allow-list + fsck _NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES (reducer-ignored). Next: f32e (impact code-v3 maint binary).
